title: Please Need help
wikitext:
[]: Please.... Need help             Quote Post by Heat149 » Sat Jul 30, 2011 3:23 am Alright, so I just fnished the original series about a week ago, and was told it would make more sense if I watched "end of evangelion". But Im still really, REALLY lost. I managed to follow all the way up until unit 1 activates itself and Shinji goes out to help Asuka, only to find that she'd been ripped to shreads by the other Evas. After that, when Rei joins Adam, and Unit 1 turns into the tree of life (or at least thats what I think is happening), I get totally lost. Please, could someone explain what the heck is going on past that point ?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 30, 2011 3:36 am Have you perused our wiki? http://wiki.evageeks.org/Episode_26%27

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Jul 30, 2011 3:47 am Ornette wrote: Have you perused our wiki? http://wiki.evageeks.org/Episode_26%27

[]:             Quote Post by Heat149 » Sat Jul 30, 2011 4:00 am Holy god.... those wiki pages just brought the entire series into fruition. Thank you so so much, it really helped things make sense. But I just got a few questions that werent quite answered 1) What exactly is instrumentality, and how did it cause 3rd impact? 2) At the end there, where Asuka and Shinji are on the beach, are they the soul survivors of 3rd impact? 3) The scene where Shinji is strangling Asuka, was that real or just a scenario Shinji's subconcious created?

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Jul 30, 2011 4:18 am Heat149 wrote: Holy god.... those wiki pages just brought the entire series into fruition. Thank you so so much, it really helped things make sense. But I just got a few questions that werent quite answered 1) What exactly is instrumentality, and how did it cause 3rd impact? 2) At the end there, where Asuka and Shinji are on the beach, are they the soul survivors of 3rd impact? 3) The scene where Shinji is strangling Asuka, was that real or just a scenario Shinji's subconcious created?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 30, 2011 4:30 am 1) Instrumentality is as explained by eyecatch and narration in episode 25 That was the very beginning of the complementation of the people by the instrumentality of man. the thing people lost. the lost minds. complimenting the vacuum in the mind. The complementation by the instrumentality of minds and soul begins. All things return to nothingness. The complementation by the instrumentality of man has just begun. Gendou: No, It's not that everything returns to nothingness. It's nothing but returning everything to the beginning. Nothing but returning things to the mother which has long since been lost. All the minds become one mind, obtaining peace forever. Nothing but that.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat Aug 06, 2011 10:31 am We should make a "Come here if you just watched End of Evangelion and are very confused" thread. No seriously, we should. Might even save us some one-time-use accounts.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Aug 06, 2011 11:21 am Someone wrote: We should make a "Come here if you just watched End of Evangelion and are very confused" thread.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Aug 06, 2011 5:42 pm ^you're technically correct still though, an EoE FAQ thread sticky is not a bad idea, it also might do a great job of bringing people to the forum as words used in the subject matter may appear as search terms on and other search engines
